modules.sql: SELECT ct.card_txn_id, ct.card_id, ct.customer_id, ct.merchant_name, ct.merchant_category_code AS mcc_code, mc.risk_level, ROUND(CAST(ct.amount AS REAL), 2) AS amount, ct.txn_timestamp, ct.as_of FROM card_transactions ct INNER JOIN (SELECT mcc_code, risk_level FROM merchant_categories GROUP BY mcc_code) mc ON ct.merchant_category_code = mc.mcc_code WHERE mc.risk_level = 'High' AND ROUND(CAST(ct.amount AS REAL), 2) > 750
